source.sqlReaderQuery:
SELECT 
    g.FinPeriodID,
    g.ProjectID,
    SUM(g.BalanceAmount) AS SumOfBalanceAmount,
    CASE 
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 0 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 5000 THEN '$0-$5K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 5000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 10000 THEN '$5-$10K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 10000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 15000 THEN '$10K-$15K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 15000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 20000 THEN '$15K-$20K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 20000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 30000 THEN '$20K-$30K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 30000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 40000 THEN '$30K-$40K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 40000 
             AND (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) <= 50000 THEN '$40K-$50K'
        WHEN (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) > 50000 THEN '$50K+' 
        ELSE 'Other'
    END AS PriceGroup,
    (-1) * SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'SALES' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Revenue,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) IN ('COGS', 'EXCOMMISSION') THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Cogs,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) = 'EXCOMMISSION' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Commission,
    SUM(CASE WHEN UPPER(a.AccountClass) IN ('EXMARKETING', 'EXF2F') THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Marketing_All,
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.AccountCode IN ('63005', '71027') THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Labor,
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.AccountCode IN ('62000', '62002') THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Materials,
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.AccountCode = '65000' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_NetCreditFees,
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.AccountCode = '64000' THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Permits,
    SUM(CASE WHEN g.AccountCode IN ('66000', '66005', '66010') THEN g.BalanceAmount ELSE 0 END) AS ACU_Service
FROM EDW.FACT_ERP_GL_TRANSACTION g 
LEFT JOIN EDW.DIM_ERP_ACCOUNT a 
    ON g.AccountCode = a.AccountCode
WHERE CAST(RIGHT(g.FinPeriodID, 4) AS INT) >= 2024 
GROUP BY g.FinPeriodID, g.ProjectID;
